articles.title: 'Siya became Sonam's younger version': Raja Raghuvanshi's mother on Goyal's bail
articles.description: The mother of a murdered Indore businessman has drawn striking parallels between her son's case and a recent alleged murder, accusing the accused of acting like a "younger version" of her arrested daughter-in-law. She expressed deep pain and urged for swift justice, criticizing the bail granted to her daughter-in-law, which she believes sends a dangerous message.

articles.title: 'Was CM setting record of Ayodhya visits to oversee theft?' Akhilesh targets Yogi
articles.description: Samajwadi Party chief Akhilesh Yadav has sharply criticized Uttar Pradesh Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath regarding the alleged Ram Temple donation embezzlement. Yadav questioned Adityanath's frequent visits to Ayodhya, suggesting they might have been to 'oversee ongoing thefts,' especially after an SIT report indicated tampered CCTV footage.

articles.title: Lionel Messi creates history, becomes first player ever to ...
articles.description: Lionel Messi etched his name in World Cup history, becoming the first player to score in seven consecutive matches with a stunning free-kick against Jordan.  This remarkable goal, his 19th in the tournament, extended his all-time scoring record.  The Argentine captain, rested for the start, came off the bench to secure a 3-1 victory, showcasing his enduring impact on the global stage.

articles.title: Watch: Mamdani dives into pool with suits on, breaks dress code to kick off summer in NYC
articles.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani has revived a decade-old tradition by taking a ceremonial plunge into a public pool, marking the start of the summer swimming season. Dressed in a full suit and tie, Mamdani's dive into the Thomas Jefferson Pool in East Harlem also celebrated 90 years of public swimming in the city, a legacy initiated by Mayor Fiorello LaGuardia.

articles.title: Candace Owens questions Erika Kirk's 'vision from God' remark in resurfaced Charlie Kirk interview
articles.description: Candace Owens reignited online debate after revisiting a past interview with the late Charlie Kirk, focusing on his wife Erika's suggestion that he keep his phone on the day of the assassination attempt. Owens questioned the unusual remark and implied it deserved closer scrutiny. Kirk had explained he witnessed the incident unfold from a gym before alerting his team that "something is very wrong." His account has resurfaced following his death.

articles.title: Nick White blasts Clavicular over viral kiss with trans model, says he destroyed the image that made him famous
articles.description: Nick White criticized Clavicular after a viral video showed the influencer kissing Polish transgender model Adeli Pali, claiming the incident had severely damaged the image that made him popular. During his livestream, White argued Clavicular's brand would "never be the same" and compared the controversy to other influencers who lost credibility after public incidents. The clip has sparked widespread debate online, with opinions divided over its impact on Clavicular's reputation.

articles.title: From inflation to mortgage rates: What moved US economy's report card this week
articles.description: US economic growth surprised on the upside, while job losses remained low. However, persistent inflation, fueled by rising fuel and electronics costs, is squeezing consumers. Despite a slowdown in spending, businesses are investing heavily in AI, leading to price hikes on tech products like Apple's Macs and iPads. Mortgage rates also saw a slight increase, adding to financial pressures.

articles.title: Hormuz got busy after months, now it's facing another roadblock
articles.description: Ship traffic through the Strait of Hormuz surged briefly following US sanctions relief and a humanitarian evacuation effort. However, a fresh attack in the Gulf of Oman halted the operation, causing traffic to plummet. Iran's warning about safe passage routes further heightened concerns, leaving major global carriers hesitant to return to the volatile waterway.

articles.title: 'Silicon Valley of North India': Ashwini Vaishnaw sees Jewar emerging as chip manufacturing hub
articles.description: Jewar is set to become a major electronics manufacturing hub with two new projects worth Rs 6,750 crore, expected to create 3,000 jobs. Union Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw announced the foundation stones were laid for facilities producing advanced printed circuit boards and HVAC components. This move signifies India's shift from assembly to deep manufacturing, aiming to reduce import dependence and boost the economy.

articles.title: Iran's inflation surges to 88.6% as war deepens economic crisis
articles.description: Iran's inflation has skyrocketed to 88.6%, its highest in months, as the Middle East conflict intensifies economic woes. Food prices have more than doubled, with bread, grains, and meat seeing staggering year-on-year increases. This surge compounds existing challenges of sanctions and hyperinflation, severely impacting household purchasing power and fueling public discontent.

articles.title: ODI tickets worth Rs 52.36 lakh went unsold: Khanna
articles.description: "Tickets worth Rupees 52,36,000 were unsold. Why all the tickets were not sold-out? DDCA started online ticket sale quite late that too without proper advertisement," Khanna claimed in a media release.

articles.title: UPSSSC ASO Mains shortlisting result 2026 released for 1,565 vacancies; check direct link here
articles.description: The Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission (UPSSSC) has announced the ASO Mains Exam Shortlisting Result 2026 for the recruitment of Assistant Statistical Officer and Assistant Research Officer posts. The recruitment drive covers 1,565 vacancies after the commission increased the original count from 929. Shortlisted candidates will appear for the mains written examination, followed by document verification and a medical examination. The recruitment is based on UP PET 2025 scores and prescribed eligibility criteria.

Shortlisted candidates will appear for the mains written examination, followed by document verification and a medical examination. The recruitment is based on UP PET 2025 scores and prescribed eligibility criteria.

articles.title: RSSB Forester Recruitment Exam 2026 Today: Check Important Exam Day Guidelines and Admit Card Link
articles.description: The Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB) is conducting the Forester (Vanpal) Direct Recruitment Exam 2026 today, June 28, in a single shift from 11 AM to 1 PM. Candidates must carry their admit card, valid photo ID, and passport-sized photograph while following the prescribed dress code and prohibited items list. Entry closes at 10 AM, and latecomers will not be allowed. Admit cards, released on June 24, can be downloaded through the Rajasthan SSO portal.
articles.full_text: The Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB) is conducting the Forester (Vanpal) Direct Recruitment Exam 2026 today, June 28, in a single shift from 11 AM to 1 PM. articles.title: Agniveer Result 2026: Final merit list date and time expected soon; here is what we know so far
articles.description: The Indian Army is expected to release the Agniveer 2026 final merit list in the first week of July for candidates who appeared in the Phase 2 Common Entrance Examination held from June 1 to 12. The ARO-wise selection lists will be available on the official portal. Shortlisted candidates must complete document verification and medical checks before receiving joining instructions. Training for selected recruits is expected to begin later in July 2026.

Training for selected recruits is expected to begin later in July 2026.

articles.title: NIFT UG 2026 round 1 seat allotment result declared; candidates can download allotment letters here
articles.description: NIFT UG 2026: The National Testing Agency has released the NIFT UG 2026 round 1 seat allotment result on the official counselling portal. Candidates can check their allotment status using their roll number and password, download the provisional allotment letter, submit their willingness and pay the admission fee. Candidates without an allotment will be considered for subsequent rounds. Round 2 choice modification and the NRI Sponsored Seat option will be available from July 3.

articles.title: Sai Durgha Tej's 'SYG' nears completion
articles.description: Sai Durgha Tej's ambitious film, 'Sambarala Yeti Gattu' (SYG), has entered its final shooting phase. Filming is underway on a massive Hyderabad set, focusing on crucial action and emotional sequences. This project, touted as the actor's biggest-budget venture, features a star-studded cast including Aishwarya Lekshmi and a surprise Bollywood actor. The film is slated for a multi-language release.

articles.title: Meghan Markle and Prince Harry accept King Charles offer for residency
articles.description: Next month, Meghan Markle and Prince Harry will grace the UK with their presence as they accept King Charles' invitation for royal residency. This exciting trip will be their children's first visit to the UK, participating in events leading up to the Invictus Games. They also plan a poignant visit to Princess Diana's grave, all amidst talks of family unity and Prince Harry's ongoing legal battles for security.

articles.title: Actor Sonu quits Kala Hiran: Film made to TARNISH Salman
articles.description: Actor Sonu Mishra has exited the controversial film 'Kala Hiran: The Battle for Legacy,' citing its intent to tarnish a senior actor's image. He was initially slated to play Salman Khan's role but withdrew upon realizing the project's negative agenda. Meanwhile, Salman Khan is pursuing legal action in Delhi High Court to halt the film's production and release, arguing his identity is being exploited without consent.

articles.title: Travis Kelce was not serious about Taylor Swift at first
articles.description: Travis Kelce did not initially desire a serious relationship with Taylor Swift, despite her efforts to connect after he brought up a friendship bracelet. He approached the situation with caution, not showing much interest. Swift, however, steadily engaged with him and introduced him to her family, which gradually transformed their friendship into a two-year relationship now surrounded by wedding rumors.
